Attending

Plan Your ISORC 2027 Visit

Everything you need to know about registration, accepted papers, campus logistics, accommodation, and travel for the symposium.

Registration

Registering for ISORC 2027

Registration details will be published once the conference dates and program are finalized. Early registration, student registration, and IEEE member discounts are expected to be offered.

Attendees should bookmark this page and check back for registration deadlines, fees, payment instructions, and cancellation policies.

Accepted Papers

Accepted papers will be published in the IEEE conference proceedings and will receive detailed author instructions once notifications are sent.

Corresponding authors will receive login details for the camera-ready submission portal and publishing workflow.

Venue

Conference location and access

ISORC 2027 will be hosted at IIT Ropar. Venue details, session rooms, and campus facilities will be shared as they become available.

Accommodation

Recommended hotels, guest houses, and campus lodging options will be announced with negotiated rates for attendees.

Details Coming Soon

Visa & Travel

Travel guidance, visa support letters, and local transport information will be provided for international participants.

Details Coming Soon

Accepted Papers

Accepted authors should plan to prepare camera-ready manuscripts and register on time to ensure publication in the proceedings.

Notifications Coming Soon

ISORC 2027

30th IEEE International Symposium on Real-Time Distributed Computing

April 2–4, 2027 · Indian Institute of Technology Ropar, India

Host

Department of Computer Science and Engineering, IIT Ropar

Indian Institute of Technology Ropar, Punjab, India

Contact

nitin@iitrpr.ac.in
